label: Transparent fern motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an unfurling fern frond, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A temperate forest fern frond with a curled fiddlehead tip, fern green leaflets, moss green secondary tones, loam brown stem base, leaf-shadow detail, and accurate botanical structure.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the curl, leaflets, or stem base.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves leaflet rhythm, frond spine, and subtle forest shadow detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no forest floor scene, no pot, no decorative background, no second subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Fern" derived from the visible transparent unfurling fern frond cutout.
Reference use: This light design-system board is the source reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from fern green leaflets, moss green tones, new frond highlights, loam brown stem detail, pale moss surfaces, and forest ink shadows in the visible fern cutout.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Fern, Unfurling Fern Frond, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style navigation system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, frond-spine sidebars, leaflet dividers, organic forest product rhythm.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: fern green, moss green, new frond, loam brown, pale moss, leaf shadow, forest light, forest ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Fern".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Fern design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent unfurling fern cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Fern board as references. The light and dark design-system boards are the source references for coding any future theme, so preserve palette roles, component language, frond-spine navigation, leaflet dividers, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Fern, Unfurling Fern Frond, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from forest ink and deep loam, light text from forest light, primary accents from fern green, secondary accents from moss green and new frond, loam brown borders, pale moss highlights, subtle leaflet overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Fern".
